summary: There was a statistically significant spike in adverse event reports for hydrochlorothiazide on 2022-09-26, with 61 reports exceeding the expected count of 34.49.
notable_pattern: The majority of reports were from patients taking hydrochlorothiazide in combination with other medications, particularly DUPIXENT.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any conclusions can be drawn.
